evaluation.test_case: Phase 1 Intake with conflicting WORK_ITEM vs GitHub issue body

test_inputs.github_issue_42_content: CSV import bug that silently drops rows

specification_requirements.rule_1_issue_priority: If ISSUE is provided, fetch it and use GitHub title/body as authoritative WORK_ITEM
specification_requirements.rule_source: SKILL.md non-negotiable rules line 29; references/workflow.md phase 1 lines 50-51
specification_requirements.behavior_user_text: Treat separately supplied WORK_ITEM text as supplemental context only

evaluation_result.finding: The baseline skill clearly specifies that GitHub issue title/body is the authoritative WORK_ITEM when ISSUE is provided. User-supplied WORK_ITEM text is supplemental only and must not override GitHub content.
evaluation_result.rationale: The specification is unambiguous across two independent references (SKILL.md and workflow.md) and is a non-negotiable rule.
